category_sources: source_facts.description says xonsh is a Python-powered cross-platform shell language and command prompt; official homepage calls Xonsh a full-featured, cross-platform Python-based shell.
display_name_sources: official homepage and documentation use Xonsh as the project name.
docs_sources: official site navigation links to Xonsh Documentation and install guide on xon.sh.
repo_sources: official xon.sh homepage links its Code/Source Code entry to https://github.com/xonsh/xonsh.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names Python-powered shell language and command prompt; official homepage describes Python and shell integration across platforms.
